name: UwsProviderSubjAreaBalSumLoad

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_uws_staging}.ABC_TMP_UwsProviderSubjAreaBalSumLoad;WITH cte_agg AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), cte_main AS (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY t.BAL_DT ASC) AS rn, t.BAL_DT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t.BAL_DT, 120) AS BAL_DT_str, t.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM t WHERE t.TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND t.SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}'), cte_recur(rn, BAL_DT, BAL_DT_str, ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, svPrevCount, svCurrCount, svCurrTlrncCd, svTempTlrncCd, svTempRslvIn, svTempRslvIncd) AS ( SELECT m.rn, m.BAL_DT, m.BAL_DT_str, m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, 0 AS svPrevCount, 1 AS svCurrCount, m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD AS svCurrTlrncCd, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'BAL' THEN 'BAL' WHEN m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'IN' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END AS svTempTlrncCd, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' OR m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'BAL' OR m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'IN' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svTempRslvIn, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NA' WHEN m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'BAL' THEN 'BAL' WHEN m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'IN' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END AS svTempRslvIncd FROM cte_main m WHERE m.rn = 1 UNION ALL SELECT m.rn, m.BAL_DT, m.BAL_DT_str, m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, r.svCurrCount, r.svCurrCount + 1, m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW' ELSE CASE WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND r.svTempTlrncCd NOT IN ('OUT','IN') THEN 'BAL' WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND r.svTempTlrncCd = 'IN' THEN 'IN' WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND r.svTempTlrncCd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'Y' ELSE CASE WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND r.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'Y' WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND r.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END, CASE WHEN m.BAL_DT_str = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NA' ELSE CASE WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND r.svTempRslvIncd NOT IN ('OUT','IN') THEN 'BAL' WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'BAL' AND r.svTempRslvIncd = 'IN' THEN 'IN' WHEN r.svCurrTlrncCd = 'IN' AND r.svTempRslvIncd <> 'OUT' THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END END FROM cte_main m JOIN cte_recur r ON m.rn = r.rn + 1 ), cte_final AS (SELECT r.* FROM cte_recur r JOIN cte_agg a ON r.rn = a.total_count) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_BAL_DT, r.svTempTlrncCd AS TLRNC_CD, r.svTempRslvIn AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS CRT_DTM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, '@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}' AS USER_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_uws_staging}.ABC_TMP_UwsProviderSubjAreaBalSumLoad FROM cte_final r

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:     Both FctsProvBalCntl and DeaProvBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area
